a.xlink:title: Base class for graphical card items, providing shared rendering, identity, and interaction logic.
Graphical zone for the player's hand, supporting horizontal and vertical layouts.
Graphical zone for the stack, displaying cards in a vertical pile.
Orchestrates lifecycle management for all player-bound UI components.
Canonical card dimension constants for layout and Z-value calculations.
Base class for zones where cards are laid out and individually interactable.
Base graphics item for zones that contain cards.
